author: SantiMod
content:
@here The Atlas Brew #30 - LORE! is starting in 5 minutes! 

Join us in the ⁠🔊┃Atlas Brew Lounge 

This week’s topic is about the secrets behind the curtains of the Star Atlas LORE! One of the big next steps in the SA project is unlocking, the vault of secrets, which contains all the star atlas metaverse lore. In the coming months that build our path towards scream we will start exploring the stories of our races, factions, manufacturers and star systems, and on this episode we want the community to come up with the questions that they most desire to know the answer to regarding the star atlas metaverse lore!

The 3 most voted community questions will be the first ones to be made public when lore disclose season start, so decide carefully on your vote!
